name: St. Andrew Goldfields Ltd.
description: St. Andrew Goldfields Ltd. was a Toronto Stock Exchange-listed gold mining, finance, and exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of strategic land positions in the prolific gold mining camps of Canada. The company operated several gold mines and a mill, with significant land holdings straddling the Porcupine-Destor Fault in Ontario. In 2016, St. Andrew Goldfields Ltd. was acquired by Kirkland Lake Gold in a friendly takeover, integrating its assets into a larger mining portfolio. The company's core properties were primarily located in the Timmins, Ontario region.
